mapper.insert: insert into task_template_department_checkpoints ( task_template_department_checkpoint_id, company_id, task_template_id, department_id, require_evidence, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{taskTemplateDepartmentCheckpointId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskTemplateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{departmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requireEvidence,jdbcType=BIT}, #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
